SMILE INDEX: 33
WINDOW: 538.500s to 576.000s (smile at 558.500s to 561.000s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[518.200-550.560] interviewee: from tomorrow on, you go by streetcar every morning to the hospital, to the pharmacy, and there you will be doing your duty.
[550.560-620.983] interviewee: For last six months, I didn't do any exercises. And I went in the morning dressed up to the pharmacy. They couldn't transfer me permanently there. But I had to go by streetcar. This was up to the end. This was the last six months. So I got away with it. After serving in the army the two years, I went to the
